note: Hostable circuit artifacts for dash-mno-verify, matching the current circuit build. The membership and registration proving keys are ~2.3GB each, over the GitHub 2GB asset limit, so host them elsewhere or rebuild with scripts/build_proving_key.sh. The membership and registration wasms changed with the M1 d<n constraint, so the circuit-keys-v2 release must be published with the rebuilt artifacts before fetch_keys.sh can install them; until then, rebuild locally. mno_members is unchanged by M1.
